title: Project Leader / NPI Program Manager
description:
Reports to: Department Manager or VP
Direct reports: n/a
Key contacts: Project managers, project team members, (senior) management

Nature of the role
Prepares and implements projects in multi-discipline areas and/or at the same time with severe changes. Implementation of new solutions/processes to cope with change(s) in part of business process. Or managing multiple strategic customer projects with high impact on commercial result.

Qualifications & Experience
Academic level of thinking with 8-10 years relevant experience. Knowledge of all involved functional disciplines and/or customer experience. Strong experience in both European & Asia Pacific environments.

Level of Communication
Manages the relation with multiple (groups of) stakeholders on strategic level and manages opposite interests and/or external customers. Typically up to (S)VP level. Responsible for creating synergy.

Key Result Areas

1) Project plan & planning
Define project scope and objectives.
Formulate the project plan, determine budget and required resources, clarify role and involvement level of team members and acquire approval and acceptance.

2) Delivery
Build (structure and organize) a high-performance team and create a project structure to optimally realize the project deliverables. Manage the execution of the project in terms of money, time, quality, organization and information and ensure that the objectives, deliverables and milestones are met.
Manage and control the scope of the project and prevent scope creep.

3) Risk Management
Define the risks of the projects (a.o. specs, costs, planning) and develop scenarios to overcome these risks and take corrective actions when necessary.
Ensure all project activities are executed in compliance with the applicable laws, requirements and regulations.

4) Project closure
Evaluate and close project, identify and analyze lessons learned, archive project documents and hand over project to customer and/or line management.

5) Stakeholder management
Build and maintain a network of stakeholders, update and consult it regularly, manage expectations of stakeholders ongoing and influence stakeholders in decision making, in order to create support for service/product and ensure alignment to business goals.

6) Reporting
Provide insights and recommendations regarding quantitative and qualitative developments by means of periodical and ad hoc reports and/or analyses to relevant stakeholders.

7) Change management
Identify the change impact, stakeholders and target groups, define the change story and fully integrate the change management activities in the overall project plan.

8) Organization management & development
Manage means, methods and infrastructure.
Organize the team (internal and external) and its context in a way that it is adaptive to changing needs. Optimally use and adapt the organization boundaries to maximize output.

9) Personal development
Keep yourself informed up to date on new developments, techniques and methods.
Use/develop (external) reference/network and know how that is state of the art in your area of technical expertise.

10) Negotiation
Negotiate with internal and/or external parties and/or customer, acquire approval and/or close contracts and monitor contracts/SLAs.

postedCompany.description:
Canon Production Printing (CPP) is a company that designs, develops and manufactures professional printing products, both hardware and software and related consumable like toner and inks.

CPP has its headquarter in The Netherlands.  CPP is part of the Japanese Canon group since 2012, headquartered in Tokyo Japan.


Canon Production Printing has an office in Singapore with procurement, quality and logistics departments.  This office is responsible for managing the Asia Supply Base for CPP and the production of printers in Malaysia and Thailand.


The Singapore office acts as an International Procurement Office (IPO) for several commodities supporting all CPP factories in Malaysia, Thailand, The Netherlands and Germany.
postedCompany.name: CANON PRODUCTION PRINTING SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
